scripture.verse: give thanks in all circumstances; for this is God's will for you in Christ Jesus
scripture.reason: Thanksgiving is the shortest path back to noticing the gifts God has already given.
scripture.posture: Name small, ordinary things from today and thank God for them one by one.
scripture.key_word_hint: in all circumstances — not only the good ones, but every one.

bible_story.title: The One Who Came Back
bible_story.summary: Ten lepers were healed, but only one — a Samaritan — turned back and gave thanks to Jesus.

testimony: God gladly receives this prayer of thanksgiving. A deeper meditation will arrive once the AI analysis completes.
